title: Senior Software Engineer - Wipro Capital India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Wipro Capital India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Wipro Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!
